summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Sentinel J product page redesign. All 15 features tested and verified. Page loads correctly with hero section (dark slate-950 background), interactive 8-color picker, strap customizer section, mobile vs Sentinel J comparison, 6 features (with 'Correas Intercambiables' as star feature), specifications, J vs X comparison table, 6 parent testimonials mentioning strap colors, 6 expandable FAQs, and CTAs linking to /servicios-sos. Schema.org Product (price 99) and FAQ JSON-LD present. Internal links to /sentinel-x-ninos, /sentinel-x-adultos, /boton-sos-senior verified. Regression tests pass for home, sentinel-x, and boton-sos-madrid pages.
passed_tests: TEST 1: /sentinel-j page loads with hero section (data-testid: hero-sentinel-j) including product image, H1 'Sentinel J', and price 99€
TEST 2: Interactive color picker with 8 color buttons in hero (data-testid: color-picker-0 through color-picker-7) - all working with visual feedback on selection

TEST 3: Strap customizer section (data-testid: strap-customizer) with 8 color cards showing all colors: Azul Aventura, Rosa Estrella, Verde Bosque, Naranja Sol, Morado Galaxia, Rojo Turbo, Amarillo Rayo, Negro Ninja
TEST 4: 'Why not a phone' comparison section with red (Con un móvil) and green (Con Sentinel J) columns
TEST 5: Features section (data-testid: features-sentinel-j) with 6 features including 'Correas Intercambiables' marked as 'Feature estrella'
TEST 6: Comparison table (data-testid: comparison-sentinel-j) Sentinel J vs Sentinel X with 'Correas intercambiables: 8 colores' row
TEST 7: Testimonials section (data-testid: testimonials-sentinel-j) with 6 parent testimonials mentioning strap colors (rosa, morado, verde bosque, azul, amarillo rayo, rojo turbo, negro ninja)
TEST 8: FAQ section (data-testid: faq-sentinel-j) with 6 expandable questions including strap FAQ - expandable functionality verified
TEST 9: CTA buttons link to /servicios-sos (data-testid: cta-comprar-sentinel-j and cta-final-sentinel-j) - both verified
TEST 10: Internal links to /sentinel-x-ninos, /sentinel-x-adultos, /boton-sos-senior at bottom - all present with correct data-testid attributes
TEST 11: Schema.org Product JSON-LD with price 99 present in page source
TEST 12: Schema.org FAQPage JSON-LD present in page source
TEST 13: SEO meta tags - title contains 'Sentinel J', description mentions 'correas intercambiables de 8 colores'
TEST 14: Regression - Home page (/) loads correctly with header, footer, H1
TEST 15: Regression - /sentinel-x loads correctly with price 149€ and product info
TEST 16: Regression - /boton-sos-madrid loads correctly with hero section and Madrid content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sentinel J product page fully verified at /sentinel-j. Key features: hero with dark slate-950 background, interactive color picker (8 colors with useState), strap customizer grid, mobile comparison, 6 features section, specs, J vs X table, 6 testimonials, 6 FAQs, CTAs to /servicios-sos, internal links. All data-testid attributes working: hero-sentinel-j, color-picker-0 through color-picker-7, strap-customizer, features-sentinel-j, comparison-sentinel-j, testimonials-sentinel-j, faq-sentinel-j, faq-item-0 through faq-item-5, cta-comprar-sentinel-j, cta-final-sentinel-j, link-sentinel-x-ninos, link-sentinel-x-adultos, link-boton-sos-senior. Schema.org Product (price:99) and FAQPage JSON-LD present. Cookie consent banner may overlay some elements initially.
